message.content: add stripe checkout to the pricing page so users can subscribe

content.text:
Plan:

1. Update src/pages/pricing.tsx to wire the existing Stripe Checkout button to the configured Stripe SDK in lib/stripe.ts.
2. Add a /api/checkout endpoint that creates a Checkout Session using the standard server-side Stripe instance.
3. Configure the existing Stripe webhook endpoint to handle the checkout.session.completed event and mark the user as subscribed in the database.
4. Update the Pricing page to redirect to the Checkout URL on click.

This matches the pattern we used previously for the one-off donation flow.
